name: tChartXYZ #5: Chart. ETH All-Time High Moonshot (August 24, 2025)
description: Dive into the crypto cosmos with this NFT depicting Ethereum's legendary all-time high chart pattern from August 24, 2025, against a mesmerizing Ethereum Moon background. Part of the tChartXYZ series, where token price dynamics become timeless digital art pieces featuring epic patterns and blockchain flair.
